seoTitle: Tiwi vs Tiwi Islands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tiwi and Tiwi Islands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tiwi vs Tiwi Islands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tiwi and Tiwi Islands.
heading: Tiwi vs Tiwi Islands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tiwi, Northern Territory and Tiwi Islands, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tiwi has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tiwi Islands (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tiwi or Tiwi Islands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tiwi has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tiwi Islands scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tiwi scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Tiwi Islands scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tiwi or Tiwi Islands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tiwi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
